pi_items.source: install_aerobridge.sh, line 151: username='admin' in createsuperuser command
task_utils.sh line 9: AEROBRIDGE_ADMIN_URL="http://localhost:8000/admin/"; Django admin path is standard /admin/

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a flight plan named 'Mumbai Coastal Survey' in Aerobridge, an open-source drone fleet management system. Admin login credentials are username 'admin' with password 'adminpass123' at http://localhost:8000/admin/. The Aerobridge system uses real fixture data from the official Aerobridge project (https://github.com/openskies-sh/aerobridge, now at openutm-labs/aerobridge) containing sample persons, addresses, and flight plans with geographic coordinates from India. The task uses a SQLite database loaded with this official fixture data, not synthetic data.
